_notes: Hand-curated by walking every element in the US Core Patient differential against the R4 Patient snapshot. Verified with PowerShell against actual JSON files on 2026-04-30. Covers: slicing addition, 6 extension slices (race/ethnicity/tribalAffiliation/birthsex/sex/genderIdentity), cardinality tightenings (identifier 0->1, identifier.system 0->1, identifier.value 0->1, name 0->1, telecom.system 0->1, telecom.value 0->1, gender 0->1), MustSupport additions, binding changes (gender version-pin removal; address.state new binding; communication.language strength preferred->extensible + new VS; telecom.system and telecom.use bindings made explicit), constraint us-core-6 on name, and element-level uscdi-requirement annotation extensions on all constrained elements.

drifts.description: Slicing added to Patient.extension in US Core (discriminator: value:url, rules: open). R4 base Patient has no explicit slicing on this element.
Extension slice 'race' added in target profile (0..1) typed Extension<us-core-race>. Not present in R4 base Patient.
Extension slice 'ethnicity' added in target profile (0..1) typed Extension<us-core-ethnicity>. Not present in R4 base Patient.
Extension slice 'tribalAffiliation' added in target profile (0..*) typed Extension<us-core-tribal-affiliation>. Not present in R4 base Patient.
Extension slice 'birthsex' added in target profile (0..1) typed Extension<us-core-birthsex>. Not present in R4 base Patient.
Extension slice 'sex' added in target profile (0..1) typed Extension<us-core-sex>. Not present in R4 base Patient.
Extension slice 'genderIdentity' added in target profile (0..*) typed Extension<us-core-genderIdentity>. Not present in R4 base Patient.
Cardinality changed: [0..*] -> [1..*]. Identifier becomes mandatory in US Core; R4 base allows zero identifiers.
MustSupport added in target (min=1 -> conformance-critical).
Element-level USCDI v3 annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to Patient.identifier in target. Marks this as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.
Cardinality changed: [0..1] -> [1..1]. Identifier system URI becomes mandatory when an identifier is present.
MustSupport added in target (min=1 -> conformance-critical).
Element-level USCDI v3 annotation extension added to Patient.identifier.system in target.
Cardinality changed: [0..1] -> [1..1]. Identifier value becomes mandatory when an identifier is present.
MustSupport added in target (min=1 -> conformance-critical).
Element-level USCDI v3 annotation extension added to Patient.identifier.value in target.
Cardinality changed: [0..*] -> [1..*]. At least one name becomes mandatory in US Core.
MustSupport added in target (min=1 -> conformance-critical).

Constraint 'us-core-6' added (profile severity: error): At least name.given and/or name.family are present or, if neither is available, the Data Absent Reason Extension is present. FHIRPath: (family.exists() or given.exists()) xor extension.where(url='http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/data-absent-reason').exists()
Element-level USCDI v3 annotation extension added to Patient.name in target.
Element-level USCDI v3 annotation extension added to Patient.name.use in target. No cardinality or MustSupport change.
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present).
Element-level USCDI v3 annotation extension added to Patient.name.family in target.
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present).
Element-level USCDI v3 annotation extension added to Patient.name.given in target.
Element-level USCDI v3 annotation extension added to Patient.name.suffix in target. No MustSupport or cardinality change.
Element-level USCDI v3 annotation extension added to Patient.name.period in target. No MustSupport or cardinality change.
Element-level USCDI v3 annotation extension added to Patient.telecom in target. No MustSupport or cardinality change.
Cardinality changed: [0..1] -> [1..1]. Telecom system code becomes mandatory when a telecom is present. R4 Patient profile does not constrain telecom.system; US Core explicitly does.
MustSupport added in target (min=1 -> conformance-critical).

Binding explicitly stated in target profile: required binding to http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/contact-point-system. R4 Patient profile does not state this binding (it is inherited from ContactPoint data type but not declared in the Patient profile itself).
Element-level USCDI v3 annotation extension added to Patient.telecom.system in target.
Cardinality changed: [0..1] -> [1..1]. Telecom value becomes mandatory when a telecom is present. R4 Patient profile does not constrain telecom.value.
MustSupport added in target (min=1 -> conformance-critical).
Element-level USCDI v3 annotation extension added to Patient.telecom.value in target.
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present).

Binding explicitly stated in target profile: required binding to http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/contact-point-use. R4 Patient profile does not state this binding (inherited from ContactPoint but not declared in the Patient profile).
Element-level USCDI v3 annotation extension added to Patient.telecom.use in target.
Cardinality changed: [0..1] -> [1..1]. Gender becomes mandatory in US Core; R4 base allows gender to be absent.
MustSupport added in target (min=1 -> conformance-critical).

Binding version pin removed: R4 Patient binds to 'administrative-gender|4.0.1' (version-locked to 4.0.1). US Core binds to 'administrative-gender' with no version pin, allowing any ValueSet version. Binding strength remains required in both.
Element-level USCDI v3 annotation extension added to Patient.gender in target.
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present).
Element-level USCDI v3 annotation extension added to Patient.birthDate in target.
Element-level USCDI v3 annotation extension added to Patient.deceased[x] in target. No cardinality or MustSupport change.
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present).
Element-level USCDI v3 annotation extension added to Patient.address in target.
Element-level USCDI v3 annotation extension added to Patient.address.use in target. No MustSupport or cardinality change.
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present).
Element-level USCDI v3 annotation extension added to Patient.address.line in target.
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present).
Element-level USCDI v3 annotation extension added to Patient.address.city in target.
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present).
New binding added in target: extensible binding to http://hl7.org/fhir/us/core/ValueSet/us-core-usps-state (US USPS state codes). R4 Patient base does not constrain address.state with any binding.
Element-level USCDI v3 annotation extension added to Patient.address.state in target.
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present).
Element-level USCDI v3 annotation extension added to Patient.address.postalCode in target.
Element-level USCDI v3 annotation extension added to Patient.address.period in target. No MustSupport or cardinality change.
Element-level USCDI v3 annotation extension added to Patient.communication in target. No MustSupport or cardinality change.
MustSupport added in target. Cardinality is 1..1 in both R4 and US Core, so this is conformance-critical (WARNING, not INFO).

Binding changed: R4 uses preferred strength to http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/languages. US Core tightens to extensible strength and changes ValueSet to http://hl7.org/fhir/us/core/ValueSet/simple-language (US-specific language codes).
Element-level USCDI v3 annotation extension added to Patient.communication.language in target.
